core_mechanism: a system of coupled nonlinear bilinear difference (recursion) equations closing under cluster-algebra mutation rules and exhibiting exact periodicity of its orbits
brief_reason: The abstract characterizes T- and Y-systems as difference equations tied to cluster algebras with coefficients and to Zamolodchikov-type periodicity conjectures, i.e. discrete recursion relations whose iteration is governed by mutation dynamics and returns periodically.
